overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a medieval village at night. The player moves along a narrow path between thatched-roof huts, transitioning to a more open area with wooden fencing. The scene features warm ambient lighting against dark night skies typical of historical RPG environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between medieval thatched-roof huts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow village passage between traditional wattle and daub huts

entered.detail: traditional medieval hut with steep straw thatched roof and wooden frame
village dwelling with thick thatched roofing and earthen walls
rough-hewn stone steps forming the uneven path surface
simple wooden post railing along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking through a narrow enclosed alley between two medieval thatched-roof huts at night. The path consists of rough stone steps and dirt, flanked by traditional wattle and daub buildings. The space is tight and sheltered, with warm dim lighting illuminating the textured walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: village common area with wooden fencing

events.description: exits narrow alley between huts into wider village area with wooden fence on left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the village opens up, passing wooden fencing on the left

entered.detail: rustic wooden picket fence lining the left side of the widening path
dark silhouettes of forest trees visible against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the narrow alley to a more open village common area. A wooden picket fence appears on the left while the thatched hut on the right recedes into the mid-ground. The path continues as a dirt trail, and distant trees become visible against the dark sky as the camera moves forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic medieval alleyway into a more expansive village common. It begins by navigating a narrow path of rough stone steps and dirt, tightly enclosed by the textured wattle and daub walls of thatched-roof huts under dim, warm lighting. As the camera moves forward, the sheltered space gradually opens up, causing the hut on the right to recede into the mid-ground. The scene then shifts to a wider dirt trail flanked by a wooden picket fence on the left, before finally revealing distant trees silhouetted against the dark night sky.
